    • includeIncrementalWriteColumns

      TdeOptions includeIncrementalWriteColumns()
      When set, the generated TDE will include a uri column (populated via xdmp:node-uri(.)) and a column containing the incremental write hash. Include these columns if you intend to use the incremental write schema-and-view approach on subsequent imports.
      Since:
      2.1.0
